hero.title: Eva Montes
hero.lead: A delicate, intense and elegant artistic proposal with a contemporary identity.

biography.title: Path
biography.description: Her journey combines training, stage presence and recognition across different areas of youth music.
items: Academy member of the Julià Carbonell Orchestra
Violin, Professional Orchestra of the Liceu
Violin, En Clave de Arts Orchestra

items.title: Mil Descobreix 2025 Winner
items.description: Outstanding recognition in the field of young talent.

items.title: “Maestro Alonso” Piano Award, July 2024
items.description: Winner of the first prize from the Asociación Legado Maestro Alonso for the performance of “Pilarcita”.

items.title: Awarded at Joves Creadors Liceu 2024, 2025 and 2026
items.description: Participation and recognition in the young creators programme linked to the Liceu.

items.title: Third prize for her vocal performance at the “Joves Interprets Musicals” competition in Andorra
items.description: Recognition obtained at Andorra’s young musical performers competition.

items.title: Sant Anastasi 2026 Honourable Mention in Singing
items.description: Honorary recognition in the singing category.

items.title: First Place in the Academica International Studies Song Competition 2026
items.description: International award for her vocal performance.
